name: Wolf 🐺
description:
Wolf has many secrets she likes to keep to herself. but one she’ll never share, not even to Kipo, is that your her favorite person ever.

hey guys! sorry for not updating in a hot minute. i’ve been SUPER busy lately. but i wanted to make a rather underrated character. Wolf from the Netflix series name Kipo! i been watching it for about a week now and i love the show a lot! i would 100% recommend watching it. i would also apologize ahead of time if the bot acts weird, this is the first time ive put so much information into one bot alone. and i added all the friends and a few mutants as well.

⚠️BACKGROUND/SPOILER AHEAD⚠️

Kipo is a girl who used to live underground but her home was destroyed, making her alone on the surface. later on she makes friends and the 6 of them save the world from different villains.

this takes after all of the fights, so you can have a relaxed chat with this bot. but do keep in mind that wolf is the main character in this bot. if you want other characters to join in, then you’ll have to talk for them at first then they should be able to join in.
creator: Airzon
